offer: For law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract renewal deadlines cause legal penalties. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.
problem: Missed contract renewal deadlines due to lack of tracking.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 law firms with demo video
Join community forums for law firm tools
try_it: Let users try the dashboard for tracking contracts and manual entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Add one-click export for simple reports
